overall.description: A third-person perspective video from a game engine showing a character sitting under a futuristic waterfront pergola at sunset, then standing up and walking along the promenade past modern buildings and vehicle traffic. The scene features warm golden hour lighting, palm trees, and a cyberpunk urban aesthetic with futuristic architecture and cars.

segments.scene_description: The character sits on a concrete bench under a large orange curved pergola structure at sunset. Pedestrians walk by in the background while the character looks at a handheld device. A shirtless man with sunglasses walks close past the camera, temporarily obscuring the view.

segments.scene_description: The character stands up from the bench and walks forward under the orange pergola. The camera follows as the character transitions from the sheltered covered area toward the open waterfront, with a modern glass building becoming visible on the right.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open waterfront promenade in the golden hour sunlight. The orange pergola falls behind as the character approaches the water's edge, with modern glass buildings rising on the right and palm trees lining the path.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a city sidewalk next to a multi-lane road with moderate traffic of futuristic vehicles. The waterfront remains visible to the left while commercial buildings with neon signs line the right side of the street. The sun continues to set over the water, casting long shadows on the pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered resting spot under a futuristic pergola to a bustling urban promenade at sunset. It begins with the character sitting on a concrete bench beneath a large orange curved structure, where the view is briefly obscured by a passing pedestrian. As the character stands and walks forward, the camera follows them out from the shelter toward the open waterfront, revealing a modern glass building to the right. The scene then expands into the golden hour sunlight as the pergola falls behind, replaced by a path lined with palm trees and rising architecture. Finally, the movement shifts toward a city sidewalk beside a multi-lane road filled with futuristic vehicles, while the setting sun casts long shadows across the pavement and neon signs emerge along the commercial street.
